businessSummary.oneLiner: Defense and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI-powered data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue reached $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue topped $650M in Q4 (+137% YoY). The Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selection as Golden Dome $185B missile defense software developer drove a +6.8% stock surge on 3/25. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - rapid adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 7.2x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34x. Extreme premium pricing in AI defense dominance

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.34. 3.5x IT sector avg. Ultra-high growth AI premium

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: Surged +6.8% on 3/25 from Golden Dome. Down 22% from 52-week high of $207

keyMetrics.name: 52-Week Range
keyMetrics.interpretation: Currently at $160.88, bouncing near the 52-week average of $153

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Reuters: Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop $185B Golden Dome missile defense system software. Rosenblatt reaffirmed Buy with $200 target. Direct catalyst for +6.8% surge

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank buys PLTR shares (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech central bank purchased 24,730 shares. Central bank buying an AI defense stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket fraud detection partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Partnered with Polymarket and TWG AI on Vergence AI-based sports betting fraud detection. Entry into $244B fraud prevention market

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI designated as Pentagon Program of Record (3/20)
growthDrivers.description: Deputy SecDef officially designated Maven Smart System as a program of record for military-wide long-term deployment

growthDrivers.title: LG CNS strategic partnership for Korea market (3/11)
growthDrivers.description: Strategic partnership with LG CNS to deploy Foundry and AIP across the entire LG Group

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-month trial contract (3/24)
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority adopted Palantir Foundry on a 3-month trial. Expansion beyond defense into government regulation

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 revenue guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as key growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-tier security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, Iran war combat validation. Moats money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement cost is prohibitively high
Top-level security clearances and 20+ years of trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Bootcamps drive rapid adoption. Ontology data model ecosystem expanding
Used in thousands of real-time strikes during the Iran conflict. Combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborative relationship with Palantir on Golden Dome

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platforms but far behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI but lack Ontology's deep integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform significantly behind Palantir in revenue and growth

recentNews.headline: Czech National Bank purchases 24,730 PLTR shares
recentNews.significance: Central bank buying AI defense stock signals strong institutional confidence

recentNews.headline: Polymarket AI fraud detection partnership announced
recentNews.significance: Vergence AI-based sports betting fraud detection with Polymarket and TWG AI. Entry into $244B fraud prevention market

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection, stock surges +6.8%
recentNews.significance: Selected with Anduril for $185B space-based missile defense system software. Stock jumped 6.8% on the news

recentNews.headline: UK FCA defends Palantir contract before Parliament
recentNews.significance: FCA justified Palantir Foundry trial contract to lawmakers amid data access concerns

recentNews.headline: Pentagon designates Maven as official Program of Record
recentNews.significance: Maven AI officially designated for military-wide long-term deployment

analystOpinions.notableComment: Rosenblatt reaffirmed Buy with $200 target post Golden Dome. Motley Fool calls it 'the most hated tech stock on Wall Street' but says it's a buy

risks.title: Extreme valuation
risks.description: Trailing P/E 246x, Forward P/E 120x. 3-7x IT sector average. Vulnerable to any growth deceleration

risks.title: Government budget dependency
risks.description: Significant revenue from US government/defense contracts. Political shifts or defense cuts could impact

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution
risks.description: Share count grew 4.67% in one year. Ongoing SBC dilutes existing shareholders

risks.title: Geopolitical and ethical controversy
risks.description: Criticism over AI weapons technology in Iran/Gaza conflict. UK FCA contract debated in Parliament

risks.title: Correction risk from highs
risks.description: Down 22% from 52-week high. Further tech selloff could amplify losses given premium valuation

buyReasons.title: Strengthened defense AI monopoly
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven program of record + Iran combat proven. Czech central bank buying. De facto standard for US defense AI

buyReasons.title: Commercial segment exploding
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial revenue Q4 +137%. AIP Bootcamp conversion rates driving sustainable growth

buyReasons.title: Global expansion accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: LG CNS (Korea), FCA (UK), Polymarket (blockchain). Diversifying across industries and geographies

buyReasons.title: Analyst upside from current levels
buyReasons.rationale: Avg target $199 (+23%), Wedbush $230 (+43%). Post-Golden Dome upgrades likely

overallOpinion: Golden Dome $185B missile defense selection drove a +6.8% surge on 3/25. Combined with Maven's military-wide adoption and Czech central bank buying, Palantir's defense AI leadership is more unassailable than ever

Commercial revenue is also exploding at Q4 +137%. LG CNS Korea expansion, Polymarket fraud detection, and UK FCA trial show rapid business diversification. FY2026 revenue guidance of +65% is accelerating
The biggest risk remains extreme valuation: Forward P/E 120x is 3.5x the IT sector average. Any growth disappointment could trigger a sharp correction
Trading above both 50-day ($146) and 200-day ($142) SMAs. Analyst consensus target $199 (+23%). Dollar-cost averaging approach is suitable for long-term investors

investmentVerdict.summary: Golden Dome and Maven adoption have deepened Palantir's defense AI moat. Commercial explosion and global expansion add to the growth story. Forward P/E 120x warrants a measured, dollar-cost averaging approach

witty.hook: PLTR: The AI Swiss Army knife with a premium price tag
witty.text:
$PLTR $160.88 (+6.8%)

Golden Dome $185B missile defense. Polymarket gambling fraud. LG CNS Korean AI makeover. UK FCA regulation. This company does everything with AI.

The Czech central bank is literally buying the stock. When a central bank buys your AI defense company, that's institutional confidence on a whole other level.

P/E 246x though. You're paying a very premium price for this Swiss Army knife. SBC dilutes 4.67% per year too.

Down 22% from $207 ATH. Today's +6.8% helps but there's still work to do. Target $199 (+23%).

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders: the wind is finally at your back
empathy.text:
$PLTR $160.88 (+6.8%)

The slide from $207 to the $140s was tough. Watching your position shrink while the company keeps winning contracts is frustrating.

But look at what just happened: Golden Dome $185B selection, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying. The fundamentals are stronger than ever.

Commercial revenue Q4 +137%, LG CNS Korea, Polymarket, UK FCA. Growth is accelerating across every segment.

Forward P/E 120x is real risk, but you're above both key moving averages now and the direction is clear.

Analyst avg $199 (+23%). DCA approach makes sense here. Be patient.
